changeSet.author: gavynholt
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO assignment (id, created_at, name, company_code, location) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), '2026-03-01T09:00:00Z'::timestamptz, 'Downtown Toronto Patrol', 'RSPNDR', ARRAY[43.6532, -79.3832]::double precision[]), (gen_random_uuid(), '2026-03-01T10:00:00Z'::timestamptz, 'North York Site Inspection', 'RSPNDR', ARRAY[43.7615, -79.4111]::double precision[]), (gen_random_uuid(), '2026-03-01T11:00:00Z'::timestamptz, 'Mississauga Alarm Follow-up', 'ALPHA', ARRAY[43.5890, -79.6441]::double precision[]), (gen_random_uuid(), '2026-03-01T12:00:00Z'::timestamptz, 'Scarborough Mobile Check', 'ALPHA', ARRAY[43.7731, -79.2578]::double precision[]), (gen_random_uuid(), '2026-03-01T13:00:00Z'::timestamptz, 'Etobicoke Night Watch', 'BRAVO', ARRAY[43.6205, -79.5132]::double precision[]), (gen_random_uuid(), '2026-03-01T14:00:00Z'::timestamptz, 'Markham Warehouse Patrol', 'BRAVO', ARRAY[43.8561, -79.3370]::double precision[]), (gen_random_uuid(), '2026-03-01T15:00:00Z'::timestamptz, 'Richmond Hill Response Unit', 'CHARLIE', ARRAY[43.8828, -79.4403]::double precision[]), (gen_random_uuid(), '2026-03-01T16:00:00Z'::timestamptz, 'Vaughan Perimeter Check', 'CHARLIE', ARRAY[43.8361, -79.4985]::double precision[]), (gen_random_uuid(), '2026-03-01T17:00:00Z'::timestamptz, 'Oakville Client Escort', 'DELTA', ARRAY[43.4675, -79.6877]::double precision[]), (gen_random_uuid(), '2026-03-01T18:00:00Z'::timestamptz, 'Brampton Incident Standby', 'DELTA', ARRAY[43.7315, -79.7624]::double precision[]);
